section.heading: Use of funds for release prevention and compliance
section.chapeau: Funds made available under section 6991m(2)(D) of this title from the Trust Fund may be used to conduct inspections, issue orders, or bring actions under this subchapter—

paragraph.content: by a State, in accordance with a grant or cooperative agreement with the Administrator, of 11 So in original. State regulations pertaining to underground storage tanks regulated under this subchapter; and
by the Administrator, for tanks regulated under this subchapter (including under a State program approved under section 6991c of this title).

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 89–272, title II, § 9011, as added Pub. L. 109–58, title XV, § 1526(a), Aug. 8, 2005, 119 Stat. 1097.)
